Loc.App.CloseConfirmMessage: There are images open in the workspace. Save the workspace before closing if you want to keep this layout.
Loc.Home.Title: Organizer
Loc.Home.Subtitle: Lightweight local workspaces, ready to open.
Loc.Home.QuickActionsSubtitle: Create an empty workspace or register new images in the library.
Loc.Home.DeleteMessage: The .owsp file will be moved to trash when possible.
Loc.Search.EmptySubtitle: Try other terms or register a new image
Loc.Search.DeleteGroupMessage: The group "{0}" and its {1} images will be permanently removed.
Loc.Search.DeleteImageMessage: The image "{0}" will be permanently removed.
Loc.Preferences.Title: Settings
Loc.Preferences.Subtitle: Visual, search, and workspace preferences.
Loc.Preferences.ThemeDescription: Choose between system, dark, or light theme.
Loc.Preferences.ItemsPerPageDescription: Defines how many cards appear per page in search.
Loc.Preferences.LanguageDescription: Changes interface text without restarting the app.
Loc.Preferences.ConfirmDeletionDescripti: Ask for confirmation before deleting cards, images, or tags.
Loc.Preferences.WorkspaceDescription: Preferences for the reference canvas and paste flow.
Loc.Preferences.PasteModeDescription: Controls where new images enter the workspace.
Loc.Preferences.CanvasBackgroundDescript: Chooses the default work area tone.
Loc.Preferences.InitialZoomDescription: Value used as reference when opening the workspace.
Loc.Preferences.HistoryLimitDescription: Defines how many workspace actions remain available for undo/redo. Use 0 to disable it.
Loc.Workspace.EmptySubtitle: Use the mouse wheel to zoom and hold the middle mouse button to pan.
Loc.Workspace.SaveErrorMessage: The open workspace could not be saved automatically. The app will stay open so you can save it manually.
Loc.Workspace.CloseConfirmMessage: Images on the canvas will be removed. Save the workspace first if you want to keep this layout.
Loc.Register.Title: Register
Loc.Register.Subtitle: Build the card, arrange images, and assign tags before saving.
Loc.Register.ImagesDescription: Select one or more images. If there are several, you can reorder them below.
Loc.Register.NoImagesHint: Use the button above to start building the card.
Loc.Register.DescriptionHint: Required for image groups. For single-image cards, the file name is used as title.
Loc.Register.TagsHint: Select the tags that will be assigned to all images in this record.
Loc.Edit.Title: Edit
Loc.Edit.GroupSubtitle: {0} images in card • editing the cover
Loc.Edit.DescriptionHint: Update the cover image description. This affects text search.
Loc.Edit.TagsHint: Select the tags assigned to the cover image.
Loc.Edit.Ready: Update the image description and tags
Loc.Tags.ManageSubtitle: Create, edit, or remove tags from your collection
Loc.CopyPicker.Title: Copy image from group
